name: LP - Get All Milestones and Usage

content.query:
SELECT
mdt.[OperatingCompany]
,mdt.[Active]
,mdt.[MilestoneDateTypeID]
,mdt.[MilestoneDateType]
,mld_vol.MilestoneCount
,mld_vol.JobCount
,mdt.[LP_MilestoneDateTypeID]
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_MILESTONE_DATE_TYPE] mdt left join
(
SELECT
[MilestoneDateTypeID]
,count([MilestoneDetailID]) as MilestoneCount
,count(distinct [JobID]) as JobCount
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL] mld
group BY
[MilestoneDateTypeID]
) mld_vol
 ON
mdt.[MilestoneDateTypeID] = mld_vol.[MilestoneDateTypeID]
order BY
[OperatingCompany]
,[Active] desc
,JobCount desc
,[MilestoneDateTypeID]
